tagline_body: Empowering facility managers with the tools to maintain pristine environments seamlessly.
demo_credentials_hint: All demo accounts use the password {{password}}. Click a card to fill the login form.
info_password_reset: Your password has been updated. Sign in with the new password.
info_invited: Account created. Sign in to continue.
error_email_required: Enter your work email above first, then click Forgot password.
info_reset_sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
reset_subtitle: Choose a new password for your CleanOps account.
reset_link_incomplete: This password-reset link is incomplete. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
reset_error_choose_password: Choose a new password to continue.
reset_error_passwords_dont_match: The two passwords do not match.
